mapper.select:
SELECT KEY_ID, COL_01, COL_02, COL_03, COL_04, COL_05, COL_06, COL_07, COL_08, COL_09, COL_10, COL_11, COL_12, COL_13, COL_14, COL_15, COL_16, COL_17, COL_18, COL_19, COL_20, COL_21, COL_22, COL_23, COL_24, COL_25, COL_26, COL_27, COL_28, COL_29, COL_30, COL_31, COL_32, COL_33, COL_34, COL_35, COL_36, COL_37, COL_38, COL_39, COL_40, COL_41, COL_42, COL_43, COL_44, COL_45, COL_46, COL_47, COL_48, COL_49, COL_50 FROM WIDE_COLUMNS
WHERE KEY_ID = #{keyId}
